# Prasad Gade

> Data Scientist and Computer Engineer from Mumbai, India. B.Tech student at SPIT (CGPA 9.26/10). Builds data pipelines, ML models, dashboards, and interactive web apps.

This is Prasad Gade's personal portfolio at prasadgade.dev. It is a single-page React app with 4 visual themes, a 3D Minecraft skin viewer, a paper physics playground, and hidden easter eggs.

## Links

- Portfolio: https://prasadgade.dev

- Email: prasadgade4405@gmail.com
